mainText:
Promo:Bank of Entitlement: Where your financial dreams come true, because you deserve it all!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: Story:So, picture this: I walk into the Bank of Entitlement, my bank, of course, and stroll up to the teller with the sun shining just right on my perfectly tousled hair. I tell her I need a loan for a new yacht because, well, my current one is so last season. She hesitates for a moment, probably in awe of my absolute magnificence, but then starts spouting off about paperwork and interest rates. Can you believe it? I kindly remind her that I am Hot Josh, the CEO of this fine establishment, and as such, rules simply don't apply to me!Naturally, she quickly rectifies her mistake and informs me that my yacht loan has been approved with a 0% interest rate for the next century. As I saunter out of there, feeling like the financial king of the world, I can't help but chuckle at the mere mortals who dare question my entitlement. Because when you're as hot as me, anything is possible.
